retry_reason: If the returned label is NULL, the input cred is invalid or missing the label; retrying with the same cred will not change the outcome.
contract_summary: Acquires a reference on the newest aa_label associated with the given cred by calling aa_get_newest_label. The caller receives a pointer to the label with an elevated refcount and must later release it via aa_put_label. The wrapper assumes the cred label is valid; if it is NULL, the function returns NULL without acquiring a reference. The caller must check the return value before using the label.
